特制的加密磁带。看起来很有可能装有重要且珍贵的数据。磁介质存储依然很重要，其高度可靠性就是原因之一。

The SMT special secure magnetic tape. Most likely contains important and valuable information. Magnetic media are still valued in information technology, including due to the high analog data reliability factor.
